questionHtml:
Which feature of capillaries distinguishes them from arteries and veins?

A. Narrow diameter

B. Valves to prevent backflow

C. Thick muscular walls

D. Elastic tissue

meta.title: Which feature of capillaries distinguishes them from arteries and veins? A. Narrow diameter B. Valves to prevent backflow C. Thick muscular walls D. Elastic tissue
